# DP3

> Dynamic Profile Processing Platform

DP3 is a configurable data processing platform for building applications around entities, attributes, modules, hooks, and processing pipelines. The documentation covers getting started, extending deployments and modules, architecture concepts, and configuration reference material.

## Overview

- [Overview](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/index.md): Introduction to DP3

## How-to guides

- [How-to](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/howto/index.md)
- [Add an attribute](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/howto/add-attribute/index.md)
- [Add an input module](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/howto/add-input/index.md)
- [Add a secondary module](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/howto/add-module/index.md)
- [Deploy an app](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/howto/deploy-app/index.md)
- [Develop DP3 itself](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/howto/develop-dp3/index.md)
- [Extend Docs](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/howto/extending/index.md)
- [Get started](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/howto/get-started/index.md)

## Concepts

- [Architecture](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/architecture/index.md)
- [Data model](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/data_model/index.md)
- [History management](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/history_management/index.md)
- [Modules](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/modules/index.md)
- [Hooks](https://cesnet.github.io/dp3/hooks/index.md)
